site.name: The Ba Zi
site.tagline: Ancient Chinese Four Pillars of Destiny

footer.description: Discover the ancient Chinese wisdom of the Four Pillars of Destiny. Free AI-powered Ba Zi readings for entertainment and self-reflection.

home.title: Discover Your
home.subtitle: Calculate your Ba Zi (Four Pillars of Destiny) chart and receive a personalized AI-powered reading based on 2,000+ years of Chinese metaphysical wisdom.
home.step1Desc: Share your date, time, and place of birth. This is all we need to calculate your unique destiny chart.
home.step2Desc: Our engine maps your Four Pillars — the cosmic blueprint that reveals your innate strengths, challenges, and life path.
home.step3Desc: Receive a detailed, encouraging reading with insights about your career, relationships, and personal growth.
home.whatIsBaziDesc1: Ba Zi (八字), also known as the Four Pillars of Destiny, is an ancient Chinese system that maps your life's blueprint using your birth moment. It reveals the unique interplay of the five elements — Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water — that shape your personality, strengths, and life journey.
home.whatIsBaziDesc2: Unlike Western astrology which focuses on star positions, Ba Zi is based on the Chinese calendar and the 60-year cycle of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches.
home.zodiacSubtitle: Each year is associated with one of 12 animals. Discover what yours says about you.
home.donateDesc: We're a small independent project. Your support keeps the server running and the content free for everyone.
home.disclaimer: All readings are for entertainment purposes only. Ba Zi is a tool for self-reflection and personal insight, not a substitute for professional advice. By using this site, you agree to our terms.
